title: AI Photo Analysis: Auto-tagging & Feedback
description: Implement AI-powered photo analysis using Claude or OpenAI vision API. Auto-tagging: when photo uploaded, analyze and generate relevant tags (landscape, portrait, sunset, urban, etc.), save to photo_tags. Photo feedback: on-demand analysis giving composition feedback, technical critique, improvement suggestions. Build UI for viewing/editing auto-tags on photos, and requesting AI feedback with response display. Rate limit AI calls per user. Gate AI features behind premium subscription. Out of scope: style transfer, edit suggestions, caption generation (future phases).
